summary: Comprehensive testing of vehicle comparison website - ALL 6 reported issues FIXED successfully. Backend API working perfectly, frontend fully functional with all filters, bidirectional sliders, correct price formatting, and dealers links.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/filters/options returns correct structure with brands, transmissions, drivetrains
Backend API /api/vehicles returns vehicle data correctly
Frontend loads without errors after backend URL configuration fix
Price formatting displays correctly (9 158 $, 11 776 $, etc.) - NO extra '0' bug
Dealers navigation link exists in header (data-testid='nav-dealers-link')
Dealers page /dealers loads with proper content
Condition filter has all 3 options: Tous (all), Occasion (used), Neuf (new)
'Tous les véhicules' is selected by default in condition filter
Brand filter section populated with 4 brands (Hyundai, Nissan, Toyota, Honda)
Body type filter section populated with 6 types with icons
Transmission filter section populated with 3 options (CVT, Automatique, Manuelle)
Fuel filter section populated with 5 options (Électrique, Hybride, Diesel, etc.)
Drivetrain filter section populated with 4 options (FWD, RWD, AWD, 4WD)
Results button displays vehicle count consistently
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (10/10 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (6/6 issues fixed)
